global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text and interactive elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to stream new hits and claim rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'BingeLayer' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main body text
elements.description: A large, bold text that reads 'Stream the hype' in a prominent position, conveying excitement.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: Smaller text below the main body text that says 'New hits every week', providing additional information.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bold button with the text 'Claim reward', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Light green background with abstract shapes, adding visual interest without distracting from the text.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: An unspecified element that may contain additional visual details or shapes, enhancing the overall design.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: Another unspecified element, possibly a decorative shape or icon, contributing to the ad's aesthetic.

elements.label: Small decorative shape
elements.description: A small circular shape in the center, adding a playful touch to the design.

elements.label: Small decorative shape
elements.description: Another small circular shape, similar to the previous one, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The prominent headline text 'Stream the hype' that captures the viewer's attention.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A visually distinct button at the bottom with the text 'Claim reward', encouraging user action.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring the text 'BingeLayer' in a bold font.
